input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.11.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.11.4.2
            TITLE: accumulator cells and/or accumulator segment(s) must be moved at the competition site

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.11.4.2: Accumulator cells and/or Accumulator Segment(s) must be moved at the competition site
EV.11.4.2 Accumulator cells and/or Accumulator Segment(s) must be moved at the competition site 
inside one of the two: 
a. Completely closed Accumulator Container EV.4.3  See EV.4.10.2 
b. Segment/Cell Transport Container EV.11.4.3

final_answer: Accumulator cells and/or Accumulator Segment(s) must be moved at the competition site EV.11.4.2 Accumulator cells and/or Accumulator Segment(s) must be moved at the competition site inside one of the two: a. Completely closed Accumulator Container EV.4.3 See EV.4.10.2 b. Segment/Cell Transport Container EV.11.4.3
